en.extract:
The Tanzanian illadopsis (Illadopsis distans) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in Kenya and Tanzania. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the pale-breasted illadopsis (Illadopsis rufipennis). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''Tanzanian illadopsis''' ('''''Illadopsis distans''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Pellorneidae]]. It is found in [[Kenya]] and [[Tanzania]]. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the [[pale-breasted illadopsis]] (''Illadopsis rufipennis''). Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
